required_tokens.TAGLINE: Short tagline e.g. 'Massage Therapy Built Around You'
required_tokens.STUDIO_ADDRESS: Full studio/clinic address e.g. '#3 — 110 Bow Valley Trail, Cochrane'
required_tokens.PRIMARY_COLOR: Hex — warm/personal brand color (deep teal, plum, terracotta, sage)
required_tokens.ACCENT_COLOR: CTA hex — warm accent (coral, amber, peach)
required_tokens.WARM_BG_COLOR: Hex — warm cream/blush for soft section backgrounds e.g. '#fdf6f0'
required_tokens.HERO_HEADLINE: 8-12 word warm/personal headline. Use around emphasis word for accent color.
required_tokens.CREDENTIAL_PILLS_HTML: HTML chunk: 2-4 .credential-pill spans for hero (e.g. 'RMT Certified', '10+ Years', etc.)
required_tokens.PRACTITIONER_BIO_HTML:
HTML chunk: 2-3

paragraphs of warm personal bio
required_tokens.CREDENTIALS_HTML: HTML chunk: 3-4 .cred-badge blocks (icon + title + sub) for licenses/certifications
required_tokens.PACKAGES_HTML: HTML chunk: 3 .package-card blocks (one with .featured class), each with optional .package-tag, h3, .package-sub, .package-price, .package-meta, ul.package-list of 4-6 items, .package-cta link
required_tokens.FEATURED_TESTIMONIAL_TEXT: Longer 2-3 sentence quote for featured spot
required_tokens.REVIEWS_HTML: HTML chunk: 3 .review-card blocks for grid below featured
required_tokens.BOOKING_URL: External booking link (Calendly, Acuity, Square, Vagaro, etc.)
required_tokens.MAP_SIDE_DESCRIPTION: 1-2 sentences about studio / arrival info / parking
